reason.core_statement: Main is the true Day 1 — the slip happened. The branch asks what the same day looks like without it.
reason.change_observed: The time slip changed the texture of the whole morning: hunger, muted attention, guardedness around found objects.
reason.why_branch: Not to correct main, but to hold the counterfactual. One variable (woke up on time, had breakfast) — what does the same world feel like from that starting point?

proposed_mutation.summary: alt1-on-time starts from the same Day 1 but with no time slip: YY woke on time, had breakfast, enters the morning fed and alert.

expected_contrast.main: hungry, attention low, found objects read as potential threats
expected_contrast.alt1-on-time: fed, alert, found objects read with their usual delight
